case_title: GAETANI REAL ESTATE VS. KAREN E. GUIDEN ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ; ORDER TO POST & MAIL; PLAINTIFF'S MANDATORY COVER SHEET AND SUPPLEMENTAL ALLEGATIONS-UD, (TRANSACTION ID # 72825847), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF GAETANI REAL ESTATE SERVED APR-09-2024, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT GUIDEN, KAREN E.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GAETANI REAL ESTATE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GUIDEN, KAREN E. DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2160 LEAVENWORTH STREET, APT. #101 SAN FRANCISCO CA 94133 SAN FRANCISCO, LEASE FORFEITED, ** APPLIES TO ANY/ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 72856657)
DECLARATION RE: RENTAL AGREEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 72856657) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GAETANI REAL ESTATE

EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR PUBLICATION OF SUMMONS (TRANSACTION ID # 72579051) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GAETANI REAL ESTATE

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GAETANI REAL ESTATE AS TO DEFENDANT GUIDEN, KAREN E. DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT GUIDEN, KAREN E.
